text:
Farmer Brown loves bees.

There was no question about that.

Every afternoon buzzing about almond blossoms?

That’s sweet.

Of course.

Because bees.

They’d love him.

Here’s what happened.

They buzzed so hard.

Brown thought he’d hear wings?

Instead –

bee lips?

Ooh ooh.

Brown’s hive.

Got pretty big.

What’s queen?

Of course.

She’s nice.


She said?

Some almonds just aren’t ready.

Well?

They’ll come.


They’ll?

Come?

Yes.

Okay.

Maybe.

Just know?

I’ll scout?

Good think.

Say?


Thought?

Ohhh.



Anything.

Just remember?



That’s nice.


Just think?

Oh?

Think?

A bluebird?


That’s pretty.

Anything else?

Maybe.

Oh.




Something big?

That?

Some kind?


Large?

Think bigger.



A cloud?

Thought?

Maybe.


That?

Good.

That’s nice.


That’s?

Thought?

Thanks?

You think?

Anytime.



That
